item.title: Wide View of Farmland
item.description: A sweeping look across farmland during daily operations, highlighting scale, machinery in action, and the landscape of modern agriculture.

media:content.media:title: Wide View of Farmland
media:content.media:description: A sweeping look across farmland during daily operations, highlighting scale, machinery in action, and the landscape of modern agriculture.

item.title: A Busy Day on the Farm
item.description: A look at a full day of farm work, highlighting machinery use, field operations, and the fast-paced nature of modern agriculture.

media:content.media:title: A Busy Day on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at a full day of farm work, highlighting machinery use, field operations, and the fast-paced nature of modern agriculture.

item.title: Selling a First Tractor
item.description: A milestone moment on the farm as a tractor is sold, reflecting on equipment history, decision-making, and changes in operations.

media:content.media:title: Selling a First Tractor
media:content.media:description: A milestone moment on the farm as a tractor is sold, reflecting on equipment history, decision-making, and changes in operations.

item.title: Looking Forward to Seeing You
item.description: A welcoming message from farm life, sharing appreciation for viewers and highlighting ongoing agricultural work and community connection.

media:content.media:title: Looking Forward to Seeing You
media:content.media:description: A welcoming message from farm life, sharing appreciation for viewers and highlighting ongoing agricultural work and community connection.

item.title: A Closer Look at the “Elephant Trunk”
item.description: A detailed look at the “elephant trunk” attachment on farm equipment, explaining its function, handling, and role in agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: A Closer Look at the “Elephant Trunk”
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at the “elephant trunk” attachment on farm equipment, explaining its function, handling, and role in agricultural operations.

item.title: Combine Cleanup in the Field
item.description: A combine covered in dust during harvest work.

media:content.media:title: Combine Cleanup in the Field
media:content.media:description: A combine covered in dust during harvest work.

item.title: Harvest Preparation on the Farm
item.description: Getting ready for harvest season with equipment checks, field preparation, and final steps before large-scale crop collection begins.

media:content.media:title: Harvest Preparation on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Getting ready for harvest season with equipment checks, field preparation, and final steps before large-scale crop collection begins.

item.title: A Strong Start for Soybeans
item.description: Early soybean planting progress showing field conditions, equipment use, and a promising start to the growing season on the farm.

media:content.media:title: A Strong Start for Soybeans
media:content.media:description: Early soybean planting progress showing field conditions, equipment use, and a promising start to the growing season on the farm.

item.title: It’s Already Done
item.description: A reflective moment on accepting outcomes after events unfold, focusing on moving forward and learning from what has already happened.

media:content.media:title: It’s Already Done
media:content.media:description: A reflective moment on accepting outcomes after events unfold, focusing on moving forward and learning from what has already happened.

item.title: Minnesota Gold Harvest
item.description: A look at golden crop harvesting in Minnesota, showcasing field work, equipment in action, and the beauty of peak harvest season on the farm

media:content.media:title: Minnesota Gold Harvest
media:content.media:description: A look at golden crop harvesting in Minnesota, showcasing field work, equipment in action, and the beauty of peak harvest season on the farm

item.title: New Truck for the Farm
item.description: A look at a new farm truck joining operations, covering features, setup, and how it supports daily agricultural work and hauling needs.

media:content.media:title: New Truck for the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at a new farm truck joining operations, covering features, setup, and how it supports daily agricultural work and hauling needs.
